title: S + 授與動詞 + IO + DO（雙受詞）

formulas.zh: 主詞 + 授與動詞 + 間接受詞（人）+ 直接受詞（物）
主詞 + 授與動詞 + 直接受詞（物）+ to/for + 間接受詞（人）

explanation: 授與動詞表示將某物給予或傳遞給他人。結構中IO（間接受詞）為人，DO（直接受詞）為物。雙賓語結構可改寫為「DO + to/for + IO」形式。選用to或for的規則：give/send/teach/show後接to；make/buy/cook後接for。此句型是英文中常見的雙賓語結構，理解兩種改寫形式對學生掌握句型變化至關重要。

examples.eng: The teacher gave the students a detailed explanation about the chemistry experiment.
examples.chi: 老師給學生們一份關於化學實驗的詳細說明。

examples.eng: She sent her grandmother a handmade card on Mother's Day.
examples.chi: 她在母親節寄給祖母一張親手製作的卡片。

examples.eng: Could you show me how to use this new software properly?
examples.chi: 你能示範給我如何正確使用這個新軟體嗎？

examples.eng: The coach taught the young athletes several effective training techniques.
examples.chi: 教練教年輕運動員們幾項有效的訓練技巧。

extension.tip: 判斷to或for的關鍵：give/send/teach/show + to（表轉移或傳遞）；make/buy/cook + for（表製作或準備目的）。注意某些動詞如send可接to（寄給）或for（派人去取），意思不同。錯用介詞會導致意思偏離。

examples.test: I gave a book to my friend. vs. I gave a gift for my friend.
examples.result: → 前句表直接給予所有權（to）；後句可能表為了朋友的目的準備禮物（for），但通常用to更自然

examples.test: She cooked dinner for her family. vs. She sent the package to the office.
examples.result: → 前句用for（為家人準備食物）；後句用to（物件轉移至辦公室）

examples.test: Please show this document to the manager. vs. Make a schedule for the team.
examples.result: → 前句用to（展示給某人看）；後句用for（為團隊製作）

extension.note: 記憶口訣：「give/send/teach/show用to轉移物件給人；make/buy/cook用for為人準備東西」

parts: all the new teachers useful teaching materials at the beginning of the school year.
exercises.sentence: The principal gave all the new teachers useful teaching materials to at the beginning of the school year.
exercises.translation: 校長在學年開始時把有用的教學資料給了所有新老師。

parts: me a wonderful recipe that has been in our family for generations.
exercises.sentence: My grandmother taught me a wonderful recipe that has been in our family for generations.
exercises.translation: 我祖母教了我一份在我們家族代代相傳的美妙食譜。

parts: all the visiting researchers with great enthusiasm.
exercises.sentence: The museum director showed the new artifact to all the visiting researchers with great enthusiasm.
exercises.translation: 博物館館長滿腔熱情地向所有訪問的研究人員展示了新文物。

parts: the finance department by tomorrow morning.
exercises.sentence: Please send this important letter to the finance department by tomorrow morning.
exercises.translation: 請在明早前把這封重要信件寄給財務部門。

mc_exercises.question_chi: 選擇正確的雙賓語結構，表示老師給學生們一份詳細的說明。
mc_exercises.question_eng: The teacher gave _______ a detailed explanation about the chemistry experiment.
mc_exercises.explanation: 正確答案是A。授與動詞 give 後接雙賓語結構時，間接受詞（IO）直接跟在動詞後，不需任何介詞。B 項的 to 與 give 搭配時應改寫形式才用；C 項的 for 用於 make/buy/cook；D 項詞序錯誤。

mc_exercises.question_chi: 選擇適當的介詞改寫該雙賓語句子，維持相同意思。
mc_exercises.question_eng: The teacher gave the students a detailed explanation about the chemistry experiment. = The teacher gave a detailed explanation about the chemistry experiment _______ the students.
mc_exercises.explanation: 正確答案是C。授與動詞 give 改寫為『DO + to + IO』形式時，需用介詞 to。A 項的 for 用於 make/buy/cook；B 項 at 無此用法；D 項 with 表伴隨不表授與。

mc_exercises.question_chi: 從四個選項中選出最恰當的授與動詞及介詞組合，完成句子。
mc_exercises.question_eng: She _______ her grandmother a handmade card _______ Mother's Day.
mc_exercises.explanation: 正確答案是B。sent 是合適的授與動詞，表『寄送』；on 用於特定日期的習語『on Mother's Day』。A 項時間介詞錯誤；C 項的 gave 語境不如 sent 自然；D 項 made...to 應改為 made...for，且語義不當。

mc_exercises.question_chi: 判斷下列哪個句子正確使用授與動詞的雙賓語結構及其改寫形式。

options.text: The baker cooked his family a delicious cake for the celebration.
The coach taught the players the new strategy to the game.
The professor showed the class an interesting discovery on the research.
The musician bought his friend a ticket to the concert for the show.

mc_exercises.explanation: 正確答案是A。cook 搭配雙賓語時應用 for，句子正確。B 項 taught 應為『taught the players to 或 taught the game to the players』，介詞用法錯誤；C 項 showed 應用 to，『on the research』詞序不當；D 項『to the concert for the show』重複冗余，介詞搭配不當。
